full_text:
Ling Tong (Gongji) 凌統 (公績)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ling Tong (凌統), styledGongji (公績), was born in Yuhang, Wujun (Presently Yuhang County, Zhe Jiang Province). Resented Gan Ning for killing his father, Ling Cao. Ling Tong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Ling Tong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
